name: Cameron Forged Steel Gate Valve 6" Class 600
description: The Cameron DuraGate forged steel gate valve is designed for critical service in oil and gas production and chemical processing. Featuring a flexible wedge gate design and bolted bonnet, this Class 600 valve provides reliable bidirectional shut-off in high-pressure applications up to 1,480 psi at 100°F.
shortDescription: Forged steel gate valve, Class 600, 6-inch flanged ends, flexible wedge.
technicalDescription: Bolted bonnet gate valve with flexible wedge gate, full-port design, raised-face flanged ends per ASME B16.5. Body and bonnet in A216 WCB carbon steel. Standard trim conforming to API 600.
features: Flexible wedge gate for tight sealing under thermal cycling
Bolted bonnet design for easy maintenance access
Full-port design minimizes pressure drop
API 600 / ASME B16.34 compliant design
Graphite gasket sealing for fire-safe operation
benefits: Reliable shut-off in high-temperature and high-pressure conditions
Reduces fugitive emissions with advanced stem sealing
Long service life with corrosion-resistant trim options

technicalSpecifications.End Connections: Raised Face Flanged per ASME B16.5

seoTitle: Cameron 6" Class 600 Forged Steel Gate Valve
seoDescription: Cameron DuraGate Class 600 gate valve, 6-inch flanged, A216 WCB body. API 600 compliant. For oil & gas, refining, and chemical applications.

faq.question: What is the maximum working pressure?
faq.answer: The Class 600 valve has a maximum working pressure of 1,480 psi at 100°F (10.2 MPa at 38°C) per ASME B16.34.

faq.question: Can this valve be used for throttling?
faq.answer: Gate valves are not recommended for throttling service. They are designed for fully open or fully closed positions only.

faq.question: What trim options are available?
faq.answer: Standard trim is 13Cr. For corrosive services, options include F316 stainless steel, Monel, and Duplex stainless steel.

name: Honeywell Ball Valve 3" Class 300 Stainless Steel
description: The Honeywell V-Ball Series ball valve provides precise flow control and tight shut-off in demanding process applications. This 3-inch Class 300 stainless steel valve features a floating ball design with reinforced PTFE seats, suitable for corrosive media.
shortDescription: Stainless steel floating ball valve, Class 300, 3-inch flanged, PTFE seats.
technicalDescription: Floating ball valve with full-port design, reinforced PTFE seat rings, blowout-proof stem, and anti-static device. Designed per ASME B16.34 with flanged ends per ASME B16.5. Suitable for bidirectional flow with zero leakage shut-off.
features: Floating ball design for tight shut-off at low pressures
Reinforced PTFE seats for wide chemical compatibility
Blowout-proof stem for enhanced safety
Anti-static device per API 608
Full-port design for minimal pressure drop
benefits: Zero leakage performance reduces product loss
Fire-safe design meets API 607 requirements
Low operating torque for easy automation

technicalSpecifications.End Connections: Raised Face Flanged per ASME B16.5

seoTitle: Honeywell 3" Class 300 Stainless Steel Ball Valve
seoDescription: Honeywell V-Ball Series ball valve, 3-inch Class 300, CF8M stainless steel, PTFE seats. For chemical, pharmaceutical, and refining processes.

faq.question: Is this valve fire-safe?
faq.answer: Yes, the valve is designed and tested to API 607 fire-safe requirements.

faq.question: Can this valve be automated?
faq.answer: Yes, it features an ISO 5211 mounting pad for direct mounting of pneumatic or electric actuators.

faq.question: What temperature range can the PTFE seats handle?
faq.answer: Reinforced PTFE seats can operate from -50°C to +230°C.

name: Emerson Fishtail Butterfly Valve 12" Class 150
description: The Emerson Fisher Fishtail butterfly valve is a high-performance, lug-style valve designed for throttling and on-off service. Featuring a contoured stainless steel disc with a fishtail shape for improved flow characteristics and reduced cavitation.
shortDescription: High-performance lug-style butterfly valve, 12-inch Class 150, stainless steel disc.
technicalDescription: Lug-style butterfly valve with pressure-assisted bi-directional sealing, contoured fishtail disc design for improved flow coefficient, and blowout-proof stem. Lugged body allows dead-end service. Designed per API 609 Category A.
features: Fishtail disc contour for enhanced flow and reduced cavitation
Pressure-assisted seat for bidirectional shut-off
Lugged body design allows dead-end service
Blowout-proof stem with double O-ring sealing
ISO 5211 mounting pad for direct actuator mounting
benefits: Excellent throttling characteristics across entire travel range
Reduces installation costs with dead-end service capability
Low operating torque reduces actuator size requirements
seoTitle: Emerson Fisher 12" Class 150 Fishtail Butterfly Valve
seoDescription: Emerson Fishtail high-performance butterfly valve, 12-inch Class 150, ductile iron body with SS disc. For water, HVAC, and chemical applications.

faq.question: Can this valve be used for dead-end service?
faq.answer: Yes, the lug-style design allows the valve to be used for dead-end service at the full rated pressure on one side.

faq.question: What is the operating temperature range?
faq.answer: With EPDM seats, the operating range is -40°C to +130°C. Other elastomer options are available.

faq.question: Is this valve suitable for potable water?
faq.answer: Yes, the valve is NSF 61 certified for potable water service.

name: Honeywell Globe Valve 2" Class 600 Carbon Steel
description: The Honeywell GenGlobe globe valve is engineered for precise throttling and regulation in high-pressure steam, water, and process gas services. This 2-inch Class 600 valve features a plug-type disc and renewable seat ring providing excellent flow control characteristics.
shortDescription: Carbon steel globe valve, Class 600, 2-inch flanged, plug-type disc for throttling.
technicalDescription: Bolted bonnet globe valve with plug-type disc, renewable stellite-faced seat ring, and integral backseat. Flanged ends per ASME B16.5. Designed per ASME B16.34 with Class V shut-off capability.
features: Plug-type disc for precise throttling control
Renewable stellite-faced seat ring for extended life
Integral backseat allows repacking under pressure
Bolted bonnet for easy internal access
Raised-face flanged ends per ASME B16.5
benefits: Excellent flow regulation with minimal erosion
Reduced maintenance cost with renewable seat
Safe repacking under line pressure

technicalSpecifications.End Connections: Raised Face Flanged per ASME B16.5

seoDescription: Honeywell GenGlobe globe valve, 2-inch Class 600, A216 WCB carbon steel, plug-type disc. For boiler feedwater, steam, and chemical injection.

faq.question: Can this valve be used for on-off service?
faq.answer: Yes, but globe valves are primarily designed for throttling. For frequent on-off service, a gate or ball valve is recommended.

faq.question: What does renewable seat mean?
faq.answer: The seat ring is a separate component that can be replaced without replacing the entire valve body.

faq.question: What is the maximum temperature rating?
faq.answer: For A216 WCB carbon steel, the maximum temperature is 425°C. Above this, alloy steel bodies are required.

name: Emerson Swing Check Valve 8" Class 150
description: The Emerson Full-Flo swing check valve is designed for low-pressure drop and reliable backflow prevention in horizontal or vertical pipeline applications. This 8-inch Class 150 valve features a ductile iron body and stainless steel disc.
shortDescription: Swing check valve, 8-inch Class 150, ductile iron body, stainless steel disc.
technicalDescription: Swing check valve with bolted cover, hinged disc, and renewable seat ring. Wafer-style body for compact installation between flanges. Designed per API 594.
features: Full-flow design minimizes pressure drop
Hinged disc closes automatically on flow reversal
Renewable seat ring extends valve service life
Wafer-style body reduces weight and cost
benefits: Prevents damaging water hammer with controlled closure
Low maintenance with renewable components
Compact installation between existing flanges
seoDescription: Emerson Full-Flo swing check valve, 8-inch Class 150, ductile iron body with 316 SS disc. For water, wastewater, and fire protection systems.

faq.question: Can this valve be installed vertically?
faq.answer: Yes, but for vertical installations where flow is upward, an optional lever and weight kit is recommended.

faq.question: What is the minimum flow velocity for full disc opening?
faq.answer: The minimum flow velocity for full disc lift is typically 2-3 m/s depending on line size.

faq.question: Is this valve suitable for throttling?
faq.answer: No, check valves are designed for automatic backflow prevention only and should not be used for throttling.

name: Cameron Pressure Relief Valve 1" Class 2500
description: The Cameron Safe-T-Relief pressure relief valve provides overpressure protection for high-pressure vessels and pipelines. This 1-inch Class 2500 spring-loaded valve features a stainless steel body and soft seat for bubble-tight shut-off.
shortDescription: Spring-loaded pressure relief valve, Class 2500, 1-inch, ASME UV certified.
technicalDescription: Direct spring-operated pressure relief valve with full-lift nozzle design, soft PEEK seat, and adjustable blowdown ring. Flanged inlet per ASME B16.5. Certified per ASME Section VIII Division 1.
features: ASME Section VIII UV certified for safety relief
Soft PEEK seat for bubble-tight shut-off up to set pressure
Adjustable blowdown ring for precise re-seat pressure
Full-lift nozzle design for maximum flow capacity
Stainless steel construction for corrosive service
benefits: Reliable overpressure protection for personnel and equipment
Reduces product loss with tight shut-off after relief
Field-adjustable blowdown without removing valve from service
seoTitle: Cameron 1" Class 2500 Pressure Relief Valve | ASME UV Certified
seoDescription: Cameron Safe-T-Relief pressure relief valve, 1" Class 2500, 316 SS, ASME UV certified. For high-pressure vessel and pipeline protection.

faq.question: What set pressure ranges are available?
faq.answer: Set pressure ranges from 150 to 2,500 psi depending on spring selection.

faq.question: What does the ASME UV stamp mean?
faq.answer: The UV stamp certifies that the valve has been tested and approved by the National Board for use as a safety relief valve per ASME Section VIII.

faq.question: Can the blowdown be adjusted in the field?
faq.answer: Yes, the adjustable blowdown ring allows field adjustment of the re-seat pressure without removing the valve from service.

name: Emerson Pinch Valve 4" Class 150
description: The Emerson Flex-Master pinch valve is ideal for handling abrasive slurries and corrosive chemicals. The full-bore rubber sleeve is the only wetted part, providing bubble-tight shut-off by pinching the sleeve closed.
shortDescription: Full-bore pinch valve with EPDM sleeve, 4-inch flanged, for abrasive and corrosive media.
technicalDescription: Pinch valve with full-bore elastomeric sleeve, flanged ends per ASME B16.5, and a direct-acting pinch mechanism. The sleeve is the only component in contact with the process fluid.
features: Full-bore design with no flow restriction when fully open
Sleeve is the only wetted component
Bubble-tight shut-off even with trapped solids
Self-cleaning action with no dead spaces
benefits: Eliminates valve maintenance from abrasive wear
Lowest cost of ownership for slurry applications
No packing or seat leakage

documents.name: Emerson Pinch Valve Sleeve Selection Guide

seoDescription: Emerson Flex-Master pinch valve, 4-inch flanged, EPDM sleeve. Full-bore design for abrasive slurries, mining tailings, and chemical dosing.

faq.question: How long does the sleeve last?
faq.answer: Sleeve life depends on service conditions. In abrasive slurry service, typical life is 3-5 years.

faq.question: Can the sleeve be replaced in the field?
faq.answer: Yes, the sleeve is a field-replaceable component that can be changed without removing the valve body.

faq.question: Is this valve suitable for food applications?
faq.answer: Yes, EPDM and silicone sleeves are available with FDA-approved materials for food contact.

name: Honeywell Control Valve 3" Class 300 with Positioner
description: The Honeywell Precision-Drive control valve is a complete assembly with a globe valve body, pneumatic diaphragm actuator, and digital positioner. Designed for precise flow, pressure, and temperature control in continuous process applications.
shortDescription: Complete control valve assembly, 3-inch Class 300, with pneumatic actuator and digital positioner.
technicalDescription: Globe-style control valve body with cage-guided trim, equal percentage flow characteristic, multi-spring pneumatic diaphragm actuator, and digital valve positioner with HART protocol. Designed per IEC 60534.
features: Cage-guided trim for stable throttling across full travel
Multi-spring pneumatic diaphragm actuator for high thrust
Digital positioner with HART communication protocol
Characterized trim options available
Low-emission packing meets TA-Luft standards
benefits: Superior process control accuracy reduces product variability
Integrated assembly simplifies installation and commissioning
Reduces fugitive emissions with advanced packing

technicalSpecifications.End Connections: Raised Face Flanged per ASME B16.5

seoTitle: Honeywell 3" Class 300 Control Valve with Digital Positioner
seoDescription: Honeywell Precision-Drive control valve assembly, 3-inch Class 300, with pneumatic actuator and HART digital positioner.

faq.question: What communication protocols are supported?
faq.answer: Standard is HART protocol via 4-20 mA analog signal. Foundation Fieldbus and Profibus PA options are available.

faq.question: What is the rangeability of this valve?
faq.answer: The valve has a rangeability of 50:1 with equal percentage trim.

faq.question: What accessories are included?
faq.answer: The assembly includes a digital positioner, I/P converter, air filter regulator, and position feedback.

name: Cameron Lubricated Plug Valve 2" Class 200
description: The Cameron Lube-Master lubricated plug valve is designed for positive shut-off in gas distribution and oil gathering services. The tapered plug design with pressurized sealant system provides bubble-tight sealing.
shortDescription: Lubricated tapered plug valve, Class 200, 2-inch flanged, carbon steel.
technicalDescription: Single-port lubricated plug valve with inverted tapered plug, sealant injection system, and bolted gland. Flanged ends per ASME B16.5. Sealant replenishment restores sealing without valve disassembly.
features: Lubricated plug design for bubble-tight sealing
Sealant injection system allows in-service restoration
Tapered plug provides smooth, low-torque operation
Bi-directional shut-off capability
benefits: Seal can be restored without removing valve from service
Reliable operation even after long periods of inactivity
Low operating torque even at full rated pressure

technicalSpecifications.End Connections: Raised Face Flanged per ASME B16.5

seoDescription: Cameron Lube-Master lubricated plug valve, 2-inch Class 200, carbon steel. For natural gas, oil gathering, and chemical injection.

faq.question: How often does the sealant need replenishing?
faq.answer: Sealant replenishment depends on service. Typical interval is 6-12 months in normal gas service.

faq.question: Can this valve be automated?
faq.answer: Yes, the valve has a standard square stem top and can be fitted with pneumatic or electric actuators.

faq.question: What is the temperature range?
faq.answer: The standard valve operates from -30°C to +180°C with standard sealant.

name: Honeywell Weir-Type Diaphragm Valve 2" Stainless Steel
description: The Honeywell Sanitary-Flo weir-type diaphragm valve is designed for hygienic processing in pharmaceutical and biotech applications. The 316L stainless steel body features a fully drainable design with Ra ≤ 0.5 μm surface finish.
shortDescription: Sanitary weir-type diaphragm valve, 2-inch, 316L stainless steel, Ra ≤ 0.5 μm finish.
technicalDescription: Weir-type diaphragm valve with 316L stainless steel body, PTFE-faced EPDM diaphragm, and manual bonnet assembly with position indicator. Designed for aseptic service with CIP/SIP compatibility.
features: 316L stainless steel body with Ra ≤ 0.5 μm surface finish
PTFE-faced EPDM diaphragm for wide chemical compatibility
Fully drainable weir design for hygienic service
CIP and SIP compatible construction
benefits: Eliminates product contamination with crevice-free design
Sterilizable-in-place reduces contamination risk
Diaphragm isolates bonnet mechanism from process fluid
seoTitle: Honeywell 2" Sanitary Diaphragm Valve | 316L Stainless Steel
seoDescription: Honeywell Sanitary-Flo weir-type diaphragm valve, 2-inch 316L SS, Ra ≤ 0.5 μm. For pharmaceutical and biotech applications.

faq.question: Can this valve be sterilized in place?
faq.answer: Yes, the valve is fully SIP compatible with 316L materials and PTFE diaphragm that withstands sterilization temperatures.

faq.question: What surface finish is provided?
faq.answer: Standard internal surface finish is Ra ≤ 0.5 μm. Electropolishing to Ra ≤ 0.25 μm is available for critical applications.

faq.question: Is the diaphragm replaceable?
faq.answer: Yes, the diaphragm is a field-replaceable component.

name: Cameron Trunnion Ball Valve 10" Class 600
description: The Cameron Trunnio-Ball trunnion-mounted ball valve is engineered for high-pressure, large-diameter pipelines. The trunnion design supports the ball at both top and bottom, reducing operating torque at high pressure differentials.
shortDescription: Trunnion-mounted ball valve, Class 600, 10-inch, double-block-and-bleed capability.
technicalDescription: Trunnion-mounted ball valve with double-block-and-bleed capability, full-bore design, double-piston effect seats, and automatic cavity pressure relief. Flanged ends per ASME B16.5. Designed per API 6D.
features: Trunnion-mounted ball reduces operating torque at high pressure
Double-piston effect seats for bidirectional sealing
Double-block-and-bleed capability
Automatic cavity pressure relief safety feature
Anti-blowout stem design with fire-safe certification
benefits: Safe operation at high differential pressures
Provides positive isolation for maintenance activities
Fire-safe design meets API 607 requirements

technicalSpecifications.End Connections: Raised Face Flanged per ASME B16.5

seoDescription: Cameron Trunnio-Ball trunnion-mounted ball valve, 10-inch Class 600, DBB capability, API 6D. For oil & gas pipelines and offshore platforms.

faq.question: What is double-block-and-bleed?
faq.answer: DBB means a single valve can provide double isolation with a bleed port between them for positive verification of seal integrity.

faq.question: What is the advantage of trunnion mounting?
faq.answer: Trunnion mounting supports the ball at both top and bottom, reducing operating torque at high differential pressures.

faq.question: What seat materials are available?
faq.answer: Standard seats are reinforced PTFE with nylon backup rings. PEEK or metal seats are available for high-temperature service.

name: Emerson Needle Valve 1/2" 10,000 PSI
description: The Emerson Precision-Needle valve provides precise flow regulation in high-pressure instrumentation and sampling systems. Rated for 10,000 psi, this 1/2-inch valve features a 316 stainless steel body and non-rotating stem tip.
shortDescription: High-pressure needle valve, 1/2-inch, 10,000 psi, 316 stainless steel.
technicalDescription: Globe-pattern needle valve with non-rotating stem tip, PTFE packing below threads, and stainless steel bonnet. Female NPT threaded ends per ASME B1.20.1.
features: Non-rotating stem tip prevents seat galling
PTFE packing below threads prevents thread contamination
Panel-mountable design with lock nut
316 stainless steel construction for corrosion resistance
benefits: Precise flow control with smooth, repeatable adjustment
Extended service life with gall-resistant stem design
Safe operation at extreme pressures
seoDescription: Emerson Precision-Needle valve, 1/2-inch, 10,000 psi, 316 SS. For instrumentation, chemical injection, and hydraulic control panels.

faq.question: What is the maximum operating temperature?
faq.answer: With standard PTFE packing, the maximum operating temperature is 230°C. Graphite packing allows up to 540°C.

faq.question: Can this valve be used for shut-off?
faq.answer: Yes, while designed for throttling, the valve provides bubble-tight shut-off at full rated pressure.

name: Honeywell Solenoid Valve 1" Class 300 with Position Feedback
description: The Honeywell Solo-Force solenoid valve is a direct-acting, 2-way normally closed valve for on-off control of liquids and gases. This 1-inch Class 300 valve features a stainless steel body and explosion-proof solenoid enclosure.
shortDescription: Direct-acting solenoid valve, 1-inch Class 300, 316 SS body, explosion-proof enclosure.
technicalDescription: 2-way, normally closed, direct-acting solenoid valve with Class H molded coil, explosion-proof solenoid enclosure, and hermetically sealed position switch.
features: Direct-acting design with no minimum pressure required
Explosion-proof solenoid enclosure
Integral hermetically sealed position feedback switch
Class H molded coil for high-temperature operation
Manual override for maintenance and commissioning
benefits: Reliable operation in hazardous environments
Simplifies wiring with integral junction box
Manual override allows system testing during power loss
seoDescription: Honeywell Solo-Force solenoid valve, 1-inch Class 300, 316 SS, explosion-proof enclosure with position feedback.

faq.question: What is the maximum ambient temperature?
faq.answer: With Class H insulation, the coil can operate in ambient temperatures up to +80°C.

faq.question: Does the valve require minimum differential pressure?
faq.answer: No, the direct-acting design allows the valve to open and close at zero differential pressure.

name: Cameron Pressure Seal Gate Valve 16" Class 900
description: The Cameron Pressure-Seal gate valve is designed for high-pressure, high-temperature power generation and main steam line service. The pressure-seal bonnet connection uses line pressure to tighten the seal, providing leak-free operation at elevated pressures.
shortDescription: Pressure-seal gate valve, Class 900, 16-inch butt-weld ends, for power generation.
technicalDescription: Pressure-seal bonnet gate valve with flexible wedge gate, butt-weld ends per ASME B16.25, and alloy steel body for high-temperature service. Designed per ASME B16.34 and ASME Section I.
features: Pressure-seal bonnet for leak-proof operation at high pressure
Flexible wedge gate for reliable sealing under thermal cycling
Butt-weld ends for permanent, leak-free connections
Alloy steel construction for high-temperature service
benefits: Zero leakage in critical high-pressure steam service
Self-tightening seal at higher pressures improves reliability
Reduced maintenance with pressure-assisted sealing

images.alt: Cameron 16" Class 900 Pressure Seal Gate Valve

seoTitle: Cameron 16" Class 900 Pressure Seal Gate Valve
seoDescription: Cameron Pressure-Seal gate valve, 16-inch Class 900, F22 alloy steel, butt-weld ends. For power generation main steam service.

faq.question: What is a pressure-seal bonnet?
faq.answer: A pressure-seal bonnet uses line pressure to create a tighter seal as pressure increases, making it ideal for high-pressure service.

faq.question: What temperatures can this valve withstand?
faq.answer: The F22 alloy steel body allows operation up to +565°C for main steam service.

faq.question: What are the typical applications?
faq.answer: Main steam isolation, boiler feedwater bypass, and high-pressure turbine lines in power plants.
